body_txt: Dear John , I find it hard to write this letter, but I have to tell you the truth. We never expected this day to come. Ever since we were separated from each other , our letters were the only way we could stay in touch. We promised one another that no matter what, despite our Feuding Families , despite you being called to the front, we would one day be together, either Happily Married or Together in Death . I write to tell you that everything that was between us is over. We're finished. It's Not You, It's Me . I cannot stand life in separation. I simply can't love you anymore, and I have found someone else . Enclosed you will find the ring you gave me . It may comfort you to know that you are neither the first nor the last to get such a letter. The practice of sending soldiers such letters dates back to at least World War I , which makes it Older Than Television . Goodbye, my former love. I'm moving across the country , and we will never meet again. I hope we both find peace in the future. P.S. See also Wikipedia , they have an article about this. P.P.S. Do also compare this to Dumped via Text Message , which is a far less formal breakup method. Contrast it with a Love Letter , which is more or less the opposite.
